title: Herbal Silky Comforting Turkish Ground Beef Stir-fry
description: This herbal and silky comfort dish features ground beef in a rich sauce with aromatic herbs for a delicious dinner option that is egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Herbs (dried or fresh)
ingredients.amount: To taste, such as oregano, thyme, and parsley

instructions: Heat a pan with vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it into small pieces.
Add onion and garlic; sauté for about 2 minutes.
Mix in cumin seeds, coriander powder, turmeric powder, and black pepper flakes. Cook for another minute to toast the spices.
Stir in herbs (dried or fresh) according to taste. Mix well until fragrant.
Pour in tomato paste and stir continuously for 1-2 minutes, allowing it to slightly thicken.
Gradually add water while stirring constantly to prevent clumping of ground beef. Let the mixture simmer gently for about 5 minutes.
Garnish with sliced red bell pepper if using, and serve hot.
